chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-4425 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ PRIORITY CASE: 1. For hearing of CMA No.19574/2024 (Stay). 2. For hearing of main case. ----------- Dated; 1st October 2024 Mr. Yousuf Makda, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. -*-*-*-*-*- Mr. Muhammad Bilal Bhatti, Advocate has filed Vakalatnama on behalf of the concerned Commissioner, which is taken on record. This Petition was filed by impugning the recovery proceeding on the basis of impugned Order dated 09.05.2024 initiated by the Respondent Department during the pendency of the Appeal before Commissioner Inland Revenue (Appeals-I), Karachi. Learned Counsel for the Petitioner submits that similar type of cases have already been disposed of with directions to the Commissioner to decide the pending Appeal(s) of the Petitioner(s), to which learned counsel for the Respondents concedes. Accordingly, this Petition is disposed of by directing the Commissioner Inland Revenue (Appeals-I), Karachi to decide the pending Appeal of the Petitioner preferably within 60 days from passing of this order, whereas, during such period the Respondent / Department shall not take any coercive action against the Petitioner. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms with listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE *Farhan/PS*
